results.rendered_html: divakṣas (diva = div + kṣas von 1. kṣi; vgl. dyukṣa) adj. im Himmel wohnend, himmlisch: divakṣaso dhenavo vṛṣṇo aśvāḥ  ṚV. 3,7,2 . divakṣā asi vṛṣabha satyaśuṣmaḥ von Indra 30,21 . divakṣaso agnijihvā ṛtāvṛdha ṛtasya yoniṃ vimṛśanta āsate 10,65,7 .
